{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Jester Twins
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Jester Twins]] are figures in legends who alternately hand out miraculous gifts or crippling curses.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4">''Unsouled'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
